mapper.select: SELECT id, meet_type AS type, title, current_members AS currentMembers, max_members AS maxMembers, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, item, created, meet_status AS status, location, description, lat, lng FROM meet_tbl ORDER BY created DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meet_tbl (meet_type, title, current_members, max_members, start_time, item, created, meet_status, location, description, lat, lng) VALUES (#{type}, #{title}, 1, #{maxMembers}, #{startTime}, #{item}, NOW(), '모집중', #{location}, #{description}, #{lat}, #{lng})
